breakdown: Solid orchestrator script with good directory structure and variable naming, but error handling is lenient (warnings logged rather than failures propagated). Type safety not applicable to bash but handled appropriately. Architecture is clean with proper separation of concerns. Test coverage is minimal since this is a shell script, and documentation could use more context on why each step exists.
reasoning: Script uses set -euo pipefail appropriately but swallows errors with || log pattern. Naming is reasonably descriptive but some variables are generic. No test coverage visible. Documentation comments explain what happens but not the purpose of each step.
